product_updates.title: OpenAI ends Microsoft legal peril over its $50B Amazon deal
product_updates.content: OpenAI has won major concessions from its largest shareholder, Microsoft, that will allow it to sell products on AWS, while Microsoft gets more cash in a revenue-share agreement.

product_updates.title: DeepMind’s David Silver just raised $1.1B to build an AI that learns without human data
product_updates.content: Ineffable Intelligence, a British AI lab founded a mere few months ago by former DeepMind researcher David Silver, has raised $1.1 billion in funding at a valuation of $5.1 billion.

product_updates.title: Investors back Skye’s AI home screen app for iPhone ahead of launch
product_updates.content: Skye's new AI app attracted investors before it even launched — a sign of interest in a more AI-aware iPhone.

product_updates.title: China blocks Meta’s $2B Manus deal after months-long probe
product_updates.content: China has ordered Meta to unwind its multibillion-dollar Manus acquisition, dealing a potential setback to Zuckerberg’s push into AI agents.

product_updates.title: OpenAI could be making a phone with AI agents replacing apps
product_updates.content: There have been plenty of rumors about OpenAI's hardware plans, which involve launching a pair of earbuds. A new note from industry analyst Ming-Chi Kuo suggests that the AI company might be working on a phone in collaboration with MediaTek, Qualcomm, and Luxshare.

product_updates.title: Meta inks deal for solar power at night, beamed from space
product_updates.content: Overview Energy's first contract with Meta is a small step toward a future of space-based solar power.

technical_breakthroughs.title: Elon Musk and Sam Altman are going to court over OpenAI’s future
technical_breakthroughs.content: After a yearslong legal feud, Elon Musk and OpenAI CEO Sam Altman are heading to trial this week in Northern California in a case that could have sweeping consequences. Ahead of OpenAI’s highly anticipated IPO, the court could rule on whether the company is allowed to exist as a for-profit enterp…

technical_breakthroughs.title: Open source package with 1 million monthly downloads stole user credentials
technical_breakthroughs.content: If you're one of millions using element-data, it's time to check for compromise.

technical_breakthroughs.title: Rebuilding the data stack for AI
technical_breakthroughs.content: Artificial intelligence may be dominating boardroom agendas, but many enterprises are discovering that the biggest obstacle to meaningful adoption is the state of their data. technical_breakthroughs.content: Google DeepMind and Korea partner to accelerate scientific breakthroughs using frontier AI models
